productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men Ciero Mid St Beige Casual Shoes
description: All suede for a smooth touch and contrast stripes, the Ciero Mid ST shoe from adidas originals makes for an easy transition from the Basketball court to street style. UpperSuede upper with adidas patented 3-Stripes and mesh paneling on the midfoot and upper heelLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar and tongue for optimum fitPadded footbed for all-day comfortHigh collar for better ankle supportMidsoleMoulded midsole detailing for vintage style and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with bee hive shaped grooves on the forefoot and herringbone grooves on the backfoot for absolute durability, grip and tractionShoe careUse a suede brush and dry cloth to clean the upperUse a leather impregnation sprayDo not store in direct sunlight
